title: Citrusy Flaky Beef Steak
description: A savory and citrus-infused dish featuring a tender beef fillet served for date night with Ukrainian flavors, suitable for low-fat diets.

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: minced for a mild garlic flavor

instructions: Trim any excess fat from the beef fillet.
Rub both sides of the beef with olive oil, salt, and freshly ground black pepper.
Place the beef on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a small bowl, mix lemon zest, minced garlic, orange juice, fresh dill leaves, and a pinch of salt together to create the marinade. Drizzle this mixture over the seasoned beef fillet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until cooked through (internal temperature reaches 63°C or above).
Remove from oven and let rest for about 5 minutes before slicing thinly across the grain to serve with citrus wedges and fresh dill.
